quote:
When a deadline looms, the heart learns to breathe between the breaths of hope and fear.  

A soldier's armor may mean triumph to many, yet every shining blade must confess its stains to the quiet river of truth.  

An envoy's footsteps across foreign plains stir not only soil but the echoes of those waiting in the ancestral hall.  

In a ward of old spirits, the weight of a single death sentence can silence the chorus of thousands.  

A wounded soul, when given the chance to heal, may find the path to redemption is paved with tenacious self-boundaries.  

When a multitude is struck by unseen forces, each fallen ember whispers of a fire that neither thrones nor armies can extinguish.  

When a child falls into the storm of illness, the clamor of the village cannot disguise the slowness of healing.
quote_preview: When a deadline looms, the heart learns to breathe between the breaths of hope and fear.
